decisions.name: when_billing_freq_values_are_updated
decisions.label: when billing freq values are updated

rules.name: X094Fxxx_con
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2) OR (3 AND 4) OR (3 AND 5) OR (1 AND 6)
rules.label: 094Fxxx_con

Flow.description: BIZ-67951 Update Automate Amendments BIZ-65601 Update payment terms if it is not matching software payment terms BIZ-65528 Remove unconnected nodes. BIZ-65428: Updated defaults of quote billing fields, created formulas in case contract fields blank Updated according to BIZ-45105 [ populate the addresses according to accounts on quote ] and BIZ-47145 [ populate the ramping users field based on YOY Quantity change on Quote ] , BIZ-48120 [Unchecking of Termination with Cancellation Fee checkbox] RR: modified to update approval status of quote BIZ-47719. Added logic to update deal type BIZ-49086 Added a logic to update approval status to pending submission for amend quote when stage is changes to pricing and proposal on amend quotes refactor code Added logic for billing level for story created for ticket BIZ-51605 Updated formula First_Year_Software_Net_Total__c fromACV change Added logic to update Cloud migration to true. BIZ-53155 Meter Type for Positive Effective Quantity RR: Moved the logic of Pricing and Proposal status update BIZ-58801 - Billing Address and Shipping address for renewals and amendments should be based on the contract and not on the account. BIZ-60867 - SFDC - Retire Select Bundle QTC - Move Hide Pricing logic to Quote Before Insert flow BIZ-60633 - Add a new field to capture Credit Memo Reason on Quotes BIZ-63234 - It should be possible to consolidate contracts with different subsidiaries BIZ-64321 - Cancellation Quotes (Deal Type = Other) for Contract Consolidation Should Not Require OSA or Approvals BIZ-64556 - Amendments do not inherit Hide Pricing = true BIZ-66291 - Revenue Forecast Fields BIZ-66524 - Cloud Migration Checkbox BIZ-66291 - Revenue Forecast Fields Fixes BIZ-66229 - Ramping User Logic BIZ-66630 - SF Quote Stage did not Update to Pending Closure BIZ-67668 - Software Invoice Date assignment BIZ-66415 - Added the Bypass Logic BIZ-67744 - Rename the Assignment Update Quote Deal Type to Other to Update Quote Deal Type to Amendment to Supersede. Also make the assignment to Amendment to Supersede BIZ-73467 - Added 2 decimal points for paymentAdjustmentChecks formula BIZ-71174 - Add conditions and update custom conditions to Get Record node Get on Premises Quote Lines

formulas.name: Biliingfrequencyformula
formulas.expression: MAX(IF(TEXT({!$Record.SBQQ__BillingFrequency__c})="Annual",0, IF((TEXT({!$Record.SBQQ__BillingFrequency__c})="Quarterly Y1 Only" || TEXT({!$Record.SBQQ__BillingFrequency__c})="Semi-annual Y1 Only"),2,8)),IF(TEXT({!$Record.Renewal_Billing_Frequency__c})="Annual",0, IF((TEXT({!$Record.Renewal_Billing_Frequency__c})="Quarterly Y1 Only" || TEXT({!$Record.Renewal_Billing_Frequency__c})="Semi-annual Y1 Only"),2,8)))

formulas.name: cancellationFeeCheck
formulas.expression: IF(NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT({!$Record.Cancellation_fee__c}))) && TEXT({!$Record.Cancellation_fee__c}) != "Standard - all fees due", TRUE, FALSE)

formulas.description: Created for BIZ-75105 - Sets Includes early termination penalty based on Cancellation fee field
formulas.name: earlyTerminationPenaltyFormula

formulas.description: Moved the logic from after to Below
formulas.name: Pricingproposalfieldupdateformula

Flow.label: Quote Before Insert Update

recordLookups.description: Get quote line records of the quote with YOY Quantity Change > 0
recordLookups.name: Get_Quote_Lines
recordLookups.label: Get Quote Lines

recordLookups.description: Get the required billing address that needs to be populated in the quote bill to address field.
recordLookups.name: Get_Required_Billing_Address
recordLookups.label: Get Required Billing Address

recordLookups.description: Get the required shipping address that needs to be populated in the quote ship to address field.
recordLookups.name: Get_Required_Shipping_Address
recordLookups.label: Get Required Shipping Address
